related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 9:00 AM, Jack Thomas was driving Samantha Robinson to a conference. Samantha held her head and told Jack: 'I have a terrible migraine today, any noise hurts.' Jack Thomas nodded and said to the car: 'Set navigation volume to Samantha's preference.'
